overview: ZEN Digital is a premium affiliate marketing platform dashboard for DAKESH KASHYAP, Founder & CEO. Features an age-gated entry, luxury dark gold UI, live analytics, a 10,000-affiliate leaderboard, AI chat powered by Claude, and a full founder control panel.
features: Dashboard with revenue stats, bar chart, live transactions, package performance
Paginated 10,000-affiliate leaderboard with search and jump-to-rank
ZEN AI chat powered by Anthropic Claude via backend http-outcalls
Founder & Admin control panel with sub-sections
Full Privacy Policy page with compliance badges
Dark luxury theme with gold accents and premium typography
